result.stdout:
KamiSama microservice tool v1.0.3
  A tool to generate common and tested infrastructrue for microservices.

Usage
  micro [command] [options]

Options
  -h|--help         Shows help text. 
  --version         Shows version information. 

Commands
  project add       Creates a project of defined microservice type.
  service add       Adds a new service to the environment
  solution add      Creates new solution and Adds dto, abstractions, services and server project types of microservice projects to the path.

You can run `micro [command] --help` to show help on a specific command.

commands.payload:
KamiSama microservice tool v1.0.3
  A tool to generate common and tested infrastructrue for microservices.

Usage
  micro [command] [options]

Options
  -h|--help         Shows help text. 
  --version         Shows version information. 

Commands
  project add       Creates a project of defined microservice type.
  service add       Adds a new service to the environment
  solution add      Creates new solution and Adds dto, abstractions, services and server project types of microservice projects to the path.

You can run `micro [command] --help` to show help on a specific command.

result.stdout:
Description
  Creates a project of defined microservice type.

Usage
  micro project add --type <value> --namespace <value> [options]

Options
* -t|--type         Project Type. Valid values: "Dto", "Abstractions", "Services", "Server". 
* -n|--namespace    The microservice namespace and also the project's name's prefix. 
  -o|--output       Output dirctory. Default: "./$Namespace$.$ProjectType$".
  -h|--help         Shows help text.

commands.payload:
Description
  Creates a project of defined microservice type.

Usage
  micro project add --type <value> --namespace <value> [options]

Options
* -t|--type         Project Type. Valid values: "Dto", "Abstractions", "Services", "Server". 
* -n|--namespace    The microservice namespace and also the project's name's prefix. 
  -o|--output       Output dirctory. Default: "./$Namespace$.$ProjectType$".
  -h|--help         Shows help text.

result.stdout:
Description
  Adds a new service to the environment

Usage
  micro service add <ServiceName> --namespace <value> [options]

Parameters
* ServiceName       Service name. 

Options
* -n|--namespace    The microservice namespace and also the project's name's prefix. 
  -l|--Lifetime     Service Lifetime. Valid values: "Singleton", "Scoped", "Transient". Default: "Transient".
  -s|--sig          input and output types Valid values: "Req", "Res". Default: "Req, Res".
  -o|--output       Output path. Default: ".".
  -h|--help         Shows help text.

commands.payload:
Description
  Adds a new service to the environment

Usage
  micro service add <ServiceName> --namespace <value> [options]

Parameters
* ServiceName       Service name. 

Options
* -n|--namespace    The microservice namespace and also the project's name's prefix. 
  -l|--Lifetime     Service Lifetime. Valid values: "Singleton", "Scoped", "Transient". Default: "Transient".
  -s|--sig          input and output types Valid values: "Req", "Res". Default: "Req, Res".
  -o|--output       Output path. Default: ".".
  -h|--help         Shows help text.

Usage

Options

  -o|--output       Output path. Default: ".".
  -h|--help         Shows help text.
